name: unimatrix
description: AWS-native memory palace with multi-LLM integration

scripts.clean: turbo run clean && rm -rf node_modules .turbo dist
scripts.mobile:eas:init: cd apps/mobile && npx eas-cli@latest init --id a93ce64a-bd02-4777-a432-35f72349253d
scripts.mobile:build: cd apps/mobile && EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 npx eas-cli@latest build --profile production --non-interactive
scripts.mobile:build:all: cd apps/mobile && EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 npx eas-cli@latest build --platform all --profile production --non-interactive
scripts.mobile:build:ios: cd apps/mobile && EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 npx eas-cli@latest build --platform ios --profile production --non-interactive
scripts.mobile:build:android: cd apps/mobile && EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 npx eas-cli@latest build --platform android --profile production --non-interactive
scripts.mobile:build:preview: cd apps/mobile && EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 npx eas-cli@latest build --profile preview --non-interactive

_eas_mobile_note: Use these for the React Native / Expo app (apps/mobile). They guarantee the correct working directory. See apps/mobile/README.md and ACCOUNTS_AND_SECRETS.md for details. Direct npx eas-cli from here is the #1 cause of 'expo-modules-autolinking' errors and huge uploads.
